# Generative Collapse Dynamics (GCD)

> A single-axiom mathematical framework: "Collapse is generative; only what returns is real."

## Project Statistics (Canonical Values)

- Version: 2.3.1
- Domains: 23
- Theorems: 746 (unique proven theorems)
- Tests: 20,235 automated tests across 232 test files
- Structural Identities: 44
- Lemmas: 47
- Closure Modules: 245
- C/C++ Assertions: 760
- Python: ≥3.11

## Core Framework (UMCP — Universal Measurement Contract Protocol)

UMCP validates reproducible computational workflows against mathematical contracts.
Every claim follows the spine: Contract → Canon → Closures → Integrity Ledger → Stance.
Verdicts are three-valued: CONFORMANT / NONCONFORMANT / NON_EVALUABLE.

## The Kernel Function

K: [0,1]^n × Δ^n → (F, ω, S, C, κ, IC)

Six outputs, 3 effective degrees of freedom (F, κ, C):
- F (Fidelity): What survives collapse — F = Σ wᵢcᵢ
- ω (Drift): What is lost — ω = 1 − F
- S (Entropy): Bernoulli field entropy of the collapse field
- C (Curvature): Coupling to uncontrolled degrees of freedom — stddev(cᵢ)/0.5
- κ (Log-integrity): Logarithmic sensitivity — κ = Σ wᵢ ln(cᵢ)
- IC (Integrity): Multiplicative coherence — IC = exp(κ)

## Algebraic Identities (Always True)

1. F + ω = 1 (Duality identity)
2. IC ≤ F (Integrity bound — solvability condition)
3. IC = exp(κ) (Log-integrity relation)

## Frozen Parameters (Seam-Derived)

- ε (epsilon): 1e-8 — guard band
- p: 3 — drift cost exponent (Cardano root)
- α (alpha): 1.0 — curvature cost coefficient
- tol_seam: 0.005 — seam residual tolerance
- c*: 0.7822 — logistic self-dual fixed point

## Regime Classification

- Stable: ω < 0.038 AND F > 0.90 AND S < 0.15 AND C < 0.14 (12.5% of manifold)
- Watch: 0.038 ≤ ω < 0.30 (24.4%)
- Collapse: ω ≥ 0.30 (63.1%)

## 23 Domain Closures

1. GCD (self-reference)
2. RCFT (recursive collapse)
3. Kinematics (motion analysis)
4. Weyl cosmology (modified gravity)
5. Security (audit validation)
6. Astronomy (stellar classification, exoplanet atmospheres)
7. Nuclear physics (binding energy, QGP, nucleosynthesis)
8. Quantum mechanics (QDM, FQHE, quantum error correction)
9. Finance (portfolio coherence, credit risk contagion)
10. Atomic physics (118 elements)
11. Materials science (element database, energy storage)
12. Standard Model (31 particles, 27 theorems)
13. Everyday physics (thermo, optics, EM)
14. Evolution (40 organisms, brain kernel)
15. Dynamic semiotics (30 sign systems, Malbolge)
16. Continuity theory (persistence, budget geometry)
17. Consciousness coherence (20 systems)
18. Awareness-cognition (34 organisms)
19. Spacetime memory (40 entities, gravitational memory)
20. Clinical neuroscience (cortical kernel)
21. Immunology (adaptive immunity, T/B cells)
22. Intelligence coherence (58 entities)
23. Fungi kingdom (12 species, mycorrhizal stress)

## Terminology (Correct Usage)

- Bernoulli field entropy (NOT "Shannon entropy")
- Integrity bound IC ≤ F (NOT "AM-GM inequality")
- Heterogeneity gap Δ = F − IC (NOT "AM-GM gap")
- Duality identity F + ω = 1 (NOT "unitarity")
- Frozen parameters (NOT "hyperparameters")
- Derives independently from Axiom-0 (NOT "rederives" or "recovers" classical results)
